name: Cradle Gold Group
description: Cradle Gold is the second largest independent junior gold mining company in the world when measured by compliant resources. Operates the Middelvlei gold mine in South Africa’s Witwatersrand Gold basin and is progressing two Definitive Feasibility Studies to open two new trackless access gold mines with planned production of 140,000 ounces per annum.

## Built to last. Trusted by the Miami Marlins.
As the official precious metals partner of the Miami Marlins, Cedar Gold Group is the name top organizations turn to. Request your free gold guide and see how a Gold IRA works.
![](https://cedargoldgroup.com/)
## Claim Your FREE Official Playbook
![](https://cedargoldgroup.com/)
